name: SQS Monitor
description: Poll an AWS SQS queue for new messages and trigger jobs when messages are received

triggers.description: Triggers when new messages are received from the SQS queue

outputs.description: Passes message information (message_id, body, sent_timestamp, queue_url) to triggered jobs via run_config

queue_url.label: Queue URL
queue_url.description: Full URL of the SQS queue to poll

job_name.label: Job Name
job_name.description: Name of the job to trigger when messages are received

max_messages_per_poll.label: Max Messages Per Poll
max_messages_per_poll.description: Maximum number of messages to receive per evaluation (1–10, SQS limit)

visibility_timeout_seconds.label: Visibility Timeout (seconds)
visibility_timeout_seconds.description: Seconds a message stays hidden from other consumers while being processed

region_name.label: AWS Region
region_name.description: AWS region name. Uses default boto3 region if not set.

resource_key.label: Resource Key
resource_key.description: Optional Dagster resource key providing a pre-configured client. When set, context.resources.<resource_key> is used instead of creating a connection from the other fields. See README for the expected interface.
